prompt: A minimalist literary book cover for 素食者, designed in an elegant East Asian art-book style with muted dark forest green and warm off-white as the only main colors. The composition is vertical and highly refined, with a split layout: the left two-thirds are textured off-white paper, while the right third is a deep green field divided by a rough organic torn-paper edge running vertically from top to bottom. On the lower center-right, place a grayscale side-profile portrait of an East Asian woman facing right, her head slightly tilted upward, eyes closed or nearly closed, with black hair tied in a low bun. Her figure should feel quiet, fragile, and contemplative. The upper part of her head is visually replaced by a torn white paper shape that merges into the page, creating a surreal collage effect. From inside the opening around her head and neck, thin wild plant stems with tiny leaves and buds grow upward diagonally, as if vegetation is emerging from her body. Add subtle paper grain, print texture, and soft tonal fading for a poetic, fine-press look. Set the main Chinese title vertically in very large dark green serif-style characters on the far left: 素食者. Near the upper middle-left, add vertically arranged author and translator credits in Chinese, small and elegant: "[韩] 韩江 著" and "胡椒筒｜译". In the upper right on the dark green area, add small Korean and English text in a delicate serif font: 채식주의자, "The Vegetarian", and Han Kang. On the mid-to-lower right, add a short vertical Chinese quote in small type: 我的身体里 有一片荒芜的森林 它枯萎了 我不想吃的东西. At the bottom right, place the publisher and year in small Chinese text: "四川文艺出版社" and "2022". Include one small solid dark green dot on the left side below the title as a graphic accent. The overall mood is restrained, melancholic, intelligent, and literary, like an award-winning modern novel cover.
